chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 309 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.11.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2018 without any progress and since inception remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Order sheet demonstrates time was granted for compliance on 01.03.2021 and 20.1.2023. Even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
